prompt: A realistic outdoor sports portrait of two American football players standing side by side on a waterfront path with the Golden Gate Bridge filling the background on a bright clear day. The player on the left wears a muddy white jersey with the large black number 10, white football pants, black undersleeves, and holds a white helmet at his side. The player on the right wears a muddy dark navy jersey with the large white number 23, white football pants, a white long-sleeve undershirt, and holds a white helmet at his side. Both athletes are full torso to upper thigh in frame, facing the camera, with their inside arms around each other’s shoulders in a friendly post-game pose. Their uniforms are visibly grass-stained and dirty from play. Behind them is blue water, a rocky shoreline, a heavy rust-colored chain barrier, distant hills, and the red-orange towers and suspension cables of the Golden Gate Bridge. Natural daylight, documentary-style sports photography, shallow depth of field, sharp fabric texture, realistic anatomy, candid team-bonding mood. Obscure both faces with smooth rectangular blur blocks for privacy.
translatedPrompt: 一张逼真的户外体育肖像，两名美式橄榄球运动员并肩站在水滨小径上，背景是晴朗天气下的金门大桥。左侧球员身穿沾满泥土的白色球衣，印有醒目的黑色数字 10，穿着白色橄榄球裤，内搭黑色长袖，身侧拿着一个白色头盔。右侧球员身穿沾满泥土的深海军蓝球衣，印有醒目的白色数字 23，穿着白色橄榄球裤，内搭白色长袖，身侧拿着一个白色头盔。两位运动员均为半身像（从躯干到大腿），面向镜头，内侧手臂搭在对方肩上，呈现出友好的赛后姿态。他们的制服上清晰可见比赛留下的草渍和污垢。背景是蓝色的水面、岩石海岸线、厚重的铁锈色铁链护栏、远处的山丘，以及金门大桥红橙色的桥塔和悬索。自然光，纪实风格体育摄影，浅景深，织物纹理清晰，人体结构逼真，展现团队凝聚力的抓拍氛围。为保护隐私，请用平滑的矩形模糊块遮挡两人的面部。

breakdown.creativeCore: 金门大桥下的橄榄球队友：此提示词可生成一张逼真的赛后肖像，展示两名满身泥泞的橄榄球运动员在水边合影，背景为金门大桥，适用于体育社论或生活方式类图片。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
